textPlain: > A simple NuGet server implementation built on Node.js that provides essential NuGet v3 API endpointsWhy not build on .NET ?
> Package importer: Included package importer from existing NuGet serverAny idea how much hard drive storage space would be needed?
Simple question: why code it in nodejs if .net core is more than capable of running it?
Because that's how Claude decided to handle it.
